summary: saveDesign saves the complete .cmd history across multiple sessions in the inn.cmd.gz file inside the save directory up to this file length limit in units of Mb. If it is set to 0, no history is saved at all
description: saveDesign saves the complete .cmd history across multiple sessions in the inn.cmd.gz file inside the save directory up to this file length limit in units of Mb. If it is set to 0, no history is saved at all
